title: SK Hynix shares plunge after US debut and drag down semiconductor sector
summary: The South Korean chipmaker fell up to 16% on the Seoul stock exchange after its Nasdaq listing failed to meet expectations, triggering a wave of selling in the technology sector and raising doubts about artificial intelligence.

title: Oil surges due to military escalation between US and Iran and fear of Hormuz closure
summary: US attacks on Iranian facilities and the threat of a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil to three-week highs, as global stock markets reacted cautiously.

title: US quarterly earnings season begins with focus on big tech
summary: Investors are preparing for a key week with reports from Netflix, Tesla and Disney, amid concerns about slowing technology growth and inflation.

title: Crypto market retreats: bitcoin falls and stablecoins suffer worst month since 2023
summary: Bitcoin lost more than 2% in the session, stablecoin market capitalization contracted by $10 billion in June, and Germany introduces new tax rules for cryptocurrencies.

title: SpaceX hits historic lows as Japan successfully tests reusable rocket
summary: SpaceX shares continue their decline after the FAA review for the Starship flight, and the Japanese space agency lands a reusable rocket prototype, intensifying competition in the space sector.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for theft of trade secrets and confidential information
summary: The tech company accuses OpenAI of illegally appropriating patented data, in a lawsuit that Elon Musk also joined to support Apple.

title: Klaviyo appoints Erica Smith as new CFO and shares rise
summary: Smith's appointment as CFO was well received by the market, boosting the share price of the marketing software company.

title: Doubts about Social Security solvency generate uncertainty about retirement in the US
summary: Several analyses warn about errors when applying for Social Security, the impact of income on checks, and the possibility of early retirement given the system's insolvency.

title: Defense of prediction markets as an investment tool
summary: Prediction markets are analyzed as a valid alternative for financial decision-making, according to articles from FT and Expansión.

title: Shein plans Hong Kong IPO worth up to $3 billion
summary: The Chinese fast fashion giant could go public in August, in one of the largest offerings of the year, according to Bloomberg.

title: Volkswagen announces 50,000 additional job cuts to reduce costs
summary: Volkswagen's CEO communicated to the workforce the need for a deeper staff adjustment, citing cost pressure and the transition to electric mobility.

title: Masdar obtains $5.1 billion to build the world's largest solar-plus-battery plant
summary: The UAE renewable energy company will finance a megaproject combining solar generation and storage, the largest of its kind.

title: Fire in a Bangkok restaurant kills 28 people
summary: The fire broke out in a food establishment in the Thai capital, and the victims reportedly died because they could not evacuate in time.

title: European Union reaches record in gas purchases from Russian LNG plant
summary: Despite sanctions, the EU continues to import gas from Russia, with record volumes from its main liquefied natural gas plant.

title: TSMC reports 68% revenue growth in June driven by artificial intelligence
summary: The world's largest chipmaker exceeded expectations thanks to demand for AI chips, consolidating its position in the sector.

title: Legal sector regulator in England and Wales 'has lost its way', according to report
summary: An independent review concludes that the regulatory authority has failed in its mission and needs urgent reform.

title: Accelerated financial digitalization could bring £33 billion to the UK
summary: An industry report urges the government to adopt digital financial technologies to boost the British economy.

title: Nvidia shows signs of bearish correction exhaustion, according to technical analysis
summary: Nvidia's stock price could be close to confirming the end of its recent downward move, pointing to a possible rebound.

title: Disney receives buy recommendation for its parks and streaming potential
summary: An analyst initiated coverage of Disney with a buy rating, highlighting the growth of its theme parks and streaming service.

title: Bernstein cuts price targets for AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile due to Starlink threat
summary: The investment firm lowered valuations for major US telcos amid potential competition from Starlink's satellite internet service.
